privileged_info_summary: The task requires the creation of an experiment file at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/posner_cueing.psyexp' and a conditions CSV file at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/posner_conditions.csv'. The CSV file must contain the exact columns 'cue_direction', 'target_location', 'validity', 'correct_resp', and 'soa', and it must have at least 12 rows to cover all valid parameter combinations.
